leadText: Hattrem (Japanese: テブリム Tebrim) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves from Hatenna starting at level 32 and evolves into Hatterene starting at level 42.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Hattrem getting ready to silence those who express or feel strong emotions Hattrem is a small, vaguely humanoid Pokémon with a pink body and a large, light blue mass of hair surrounding its head. It has a conical point on top of its hair that is pink at the bottom and white at the top, with the tip being crooked and tapering off at the end. This gives the hair the appearance of a witch's hat. On the sides of its hair are two large, blue bulbous growths that appears to be held by pink rings. These growths resembles ponytails and Hattrem uses them to stand on. Hattrem has two, thin arms lacking any digits, and a white ovular spot on its chest. Its waist extends out into two lumps, with very small, light blue joint-less and digit-less legs. Its eyes have black sclerae and white pupils, with two pink dots for highlights that make its pupils vaguely resemble cartoon hearts. Hattrem makes use of its ponytails as hands, pummeling its foes with them. One blow from these ponytails would knock out a professional boxer. Hattrem perceives strong emotions, including positive ones, as if they're really loud noises. Thus, Hattrem will violently silence anything nearby expressing or feeling strong emotions. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Hattrem evolves from Hatenna and evolves into Hatterene . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Hatenna Psychic → First Evolution Hattrem Psychic → Second Evolution Hatterene Psychic Fairy

Generation VIII Galar #242 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #041 Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently. Shield Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer. Generation IX Paldea #283 Kitakami #93 Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet To this Pokémon, strong emotions apparently feel like incredibly loud noises—even if the emotions are happy ones. Violet The moment this Pokémon finds someone who's emitting strong emotions, it will pummel them senseless with its braids to silence them. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN139 Hattrem Ash's Rotom Phone Hattrem, the Serene Pokémon. A Psychic type, and the evolved form of Hatenna . When it comes across anyone exuding strong emotions, it will use its braids to beat them up with the strength of a pro boxer. Episode Pokémon Source Entry HZ053 Hattrem Dot's Rotom Phone Hattrem, the Serene Pokémon. A Psychic type. Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down.
